3252830.name: Wychwood Hollow
3252830.description:
You are alone in Wychwood Hollow, Cornwall, to investigate the local legend of Eliza Trewithian the Cornwall Wood Witch. She haunts the ancient oak wood, since her death in 1793, torn apart by the hunting hounds of Trelawney Manor. Does Eliza seek revenge, or just witnesses to remember her story?

Armed with a collection of ghost-hunting gadgets, it’s up to you to solve the case. Help is at hand, as a group of paranormal investigators have research and old documents to share.

Gather evidence, decipher old documents, follow advice (or don’t!) and experience a very realistic ghost-hunt in full 360 views.

Features:

  • Explore the haunted environments, captured in detailed 360 views.

  • Use Ghost Hunting gadgets to investigate supernatural activity.

  • Conduct paranormal investigations using a range of investigation methods.

  • Use Dictaphone EVP recordings, Night Vision camera, EMF Detectors and more to pinpoint phenomena.

  • Follow ghostly clues heard via the Ghost Box.

  • Re-live the teams adventures by unlocking 'Found Footage' expeditions.

  • Environmental soundtrack recorded on location.

  • Encounter real-world paranormal activity based on witness statements.

  • Experience hauntings based on eye witness accounts.

  • Uncover the complete story, to a satisfying conclusion.

  • Point And Click interface Adventure Game.

  • Solo gameplay.
3252830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
